definition: TWD and KRW have functionally reclassified from EM currencies to semiconductor proxy status. TWD/KRW-SOX correlation has risen from ~0.3 to ~0.7 while R-squared against traditional EM factors (VIX, EMBI, DXY) has declined. EM FX strategies including TWD/KRW in standard baskets are systematically mispricing factor exposure.
evidence: R-squared against traditional EM factors declining
Taiwan CA surplus ~14% GDP from TSMC
Geopolitical tail risk qualitatively different from standard EM political risk
open_questions: How to properly classify these currencies in portfolio construction
Whether other EM currencies will similarly reclassify around specific industries
